data.title: [Cleanup] Cream normalize: replace #faf8f5 literals with #f8f6f0; fix stale /* #f7f6f2 */ comment

data.to:
**[CRITICAL CLEANUP]**

Per FRAC-21 §H5 and the canonical-cream decision already recorded on FRAC-19: replace stray cream literals with the canonical `#f8f6f0` and fix the stale `index.css:46` comment.

## What's wrong

1. `src/index.css:46` comment claims `/* #f7f6f2 */` but the actual `--background` HSL (40 25% 96%) resolves to `#f8f6f0`. Comment is stale.
2. `src/pages/Home.tsx:25` hardcodes `bg-[#faf8f5]` for the Golden Age Protocol section — a pinker cream that doesn't match the body bg.
3. `src/components/sections/Hero.tsx:90,114,121` hardcodes the same `bg-[#faf8f5]` on hero, search input, dropdown.
4. `src/index.css:152` `.hero-text-shadow` uses `rgba(250,248,245,…)` = `#faf8f5`.
5. Tooltips `OctahedronHero.tsx:764` use `rgba(250,248,245,0.92)` = `#faf8f5`.
6. `src/components/three/FractalCityScene.tsx:14` ambient light uses `#f5f0ea`.

## Action

- Replace all hardcoded `#faf8f5` literals with the system token (`bg-background` for Tailwind, `hsl(var(--background))` for inline, or `#f8f6f0` as the explicit hex if the token reference doesn't fit context — e.g. Three.js / SVG)
- Replace `.hero-text-shadow` `rgba(250,248,245,…)` with `rgba(248,246,240,…)` (the canonical cream)
- Fix the stale `src/index.css:46` comment to `/* #f8f6f0 — warm off-white */`
- Verify: the visible seam between body bg and the hero/protocol-section overlay vanishes (or document it as intentional if not)

## NOT in scope
- The FractalCityScene ambient light `#f5f0ea` is its own decision (warm 3D ambient ≠ surface paint) — leave unless visually problematic

## Acceptance criteria

- Zero `#faf8f5` literals in `src/` (grep-clean)
- Zero `rgba(250,248,245,…)` literals
- `src/index.css:46` comment corrected
- Visual smoke: home, hero, all pages render with consistent cream

## Cites
FRAC-21 synthesis §H5; FRAC-19 comment recording canonical cream = #f8f6f0

data.body: Review (orchestrator, fresh context): 8 hits found and normalized across 6 files (index.css, Hero.tsx, SkylineSilhouette.tsx, OctahedronHero.tsx, FractalObject.tsx, Home.tsx). SkylineSilhouette was beyond the planned expected list — agent caught it via grep. Stale comment corrected. Build passes, tests match master baseline. Branch frac-26-cream-normalize. **Note:** FractalObject.tsx edit will conflict with FRAC-25's delete at merge time — FRAC-25 wins (file gone), this edit becomes no-op.
